top_findings.title: POST /books endpoint implemented
top_findings.evidence: app.py:80-102 — create_book() handles book creation with validation

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} endpoint implemented
top_findings.evidence: app.py:116-122 — get_book() fetches single book with 404 handling

top_findings.title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint implemented
top_findings.evidence: app.py:124-149 — update_book() supports partial updates with validation

top_findings.title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint implemented
top_findings.evidence: app.py:151-159 — delete_book() removes book and returns 204
